# Ghostty Shell Integration

This directory vendors Ghostty's shell integration scripts so Conductor can
provide OSC 133 prompt and command-completion metadata without requiring an
external Ghostty.app installation.

- Upstream: https://github.com/ghostty-org/ghostty/tree/main/src/shell-integration
- License: GPL-3.0-or-later

The individual scripts retain their upstream license headers. Keep this
directory synchronized as a whole when updating the vendored copy.
